headline: Dominion Energy’s Offshore Wind Milestone And What It Means For Valuation
summary: Dominion Energy's Coastal Virginia Offshore Wind project has delivered its first power to the grid. The project is the largest offshore wind development in the United States to begin operations. Once fully operational, it is expected to supply clean energy to more than 500,000 customers. For investors watching NYSE:D, this milestone arrives with the stock at $64.23 and a 1 year return of 27.4%. Over 3 years, the stock shows a 28.6% return, while the year to date move sits at 8.4%. This...
